introSection: SuperSplash is a steel water roller coaster at Plopsaland Belgium in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It is a SuperSplash installation from Mack Rides. The ride is themed to the Studio 100 character Piet Piraat.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an elevator lift, which rotates as it elevates the car. The initial drop is followed by a small airtime hill, which leads into the splashdown. From this point forwards, the car moves slowly through a flat section in the water before reaching the station.

fullText:
SuperSplash is a steel water roller coaster at Plopsaland Belgium in Adinkerke-De Panne, West Flanders, Flemish Region, Belgium. It is a SuperSplash installation from Mack Rides. The ride is themed to the Studio 100 character Piet Piraat.



The ride has an elevator lift, which rotates as it elevates the car. The initial drop is followed by a small airtime hill, which leads into the splashdown. From this point forwards, the car moves slowly through a flat section in the water before reaching the station.
